strengths: 15+ years of polyglot engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices at scale
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial initiative and long-term ownership
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
concerns: No advanced degree in AI/ML and no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale
Career level is Senior/Staff IC — lacks Principal/Director-level scope, org influence, or executive advisory experience
No evidence of advising strategic customers/partners or shaping cloud product future-state strategy

key_factors.factor: Depth of AI/ML expertise and shipped AI products
Breadth of 15-year engineering experience across stacks

response.justification: The role demands recognized AI expertise, cloud product strategy vision, and Director-level IC influence advising strategic customers. The candidate meets the 15-year experience bar and shows early AI-adjacent work (MCP generators, agentic frameworks at re:cinq since April 2025), but there is no evidence of shipped AI products, ML research, or recognized AI thought leadership. Titles top out at Staff/Senior with no Principal-scope initiatives, no record of advising external partners, and only a BS in CS — missing the preferred MS/PhD in AI. Strong craftsmanship and entrepreneurial signal (GISCollective) partially offset, but the core competencies for this specific role are largely absent.
